problem id: 6349d105
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) XOR SHL(3)

examples:
  10001010 -> 11110010
  10000011 -> 11111000
  11000001 -> 01111000
  10100111 -> 11010001
  00001101 -> 00101011
  01000011 -> 11001000
  00101010 -> 11011010
  10010010 -> 00110100

query: 10110110
predicted answer: 00011101
